item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic chicken Danois with fried potatoes, cucumber salad, plum compote and a light sauce. (13+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Fried dill and pea patties with fried potatoes, cucumber salad, plum compote and a fresh herb sauce. (13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Filipino chicken adobo with jasmine rice, topped with steamed pak choy. Served with roasted aubergine, haricots verts salad and a slightly tangy papaya compote on the side. Also available gluten-free. (1+7+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Filipino tofu adobo with jasmine rice, topped with steamed pak choy. Served with roasted aubergine, haricots verts salad and a slightly tangy papaya compote on the side. Also available gluten-free. (1+7+15)
